output.final_deliverable:
I could not complete the task because no visit/search results were provided from the requested page. The merged results array is empty, so there is no evidence to extract links from https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Main_Page.

What is missing (explicit):
1. A visit result (page HTML or parsed link list) for: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Main_Page
2. Any scraped/merged results that list the links, link text, and/or snippets from that page

I need one of the following to proceed:
- Permission to fetch (visit) the page now so I can collect the links and produce the requested output (10 links with URL, link text/title, and a 1–2 sentence description each), or
- You can provide the page content or a list of links from that page, and I will extract and format the requested information.

If you want me to fetch the page now, confirm and I will retrieve https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Main_Page and then return a numbered list of 10 links with full URLs, link text/title, and brief descriptions, including URL citations.

Note on required format: When I fetch the page I will present exact URLs and link texts, and short (1–2 sentence) descriptions based only on content from each linked page (with URL citations).
